problems.cause: Nested annex agree blocks: line 94 starts a new annex inside an existing annex block, which is syntactically invalid in AADL
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the duplicate 'annex agree {' on line 94 and keep only the outer annex agree {** ... **}; block

executor_steps: Ensure the annex agree block is properly closed with '**};' on the final line (line 98)
